prompt: A digital anime-style illustration of a cute girl with long, smooth pastel pink hair with slightly curled ends, wearing a delicate pearl hair clip on the left side. She has large, bright blue-purple eyes with detailed highlights, fair skin with a slight blush on her cheeks. She is wearing a light pink lace-trimmed short-sleeve blouse with a small bow at the collar, paired with a high-waisted white pleated short skirt, white knee-high socks, and light pink Mary Jane shoes. She is looking directly at the viewer with a warm, confident smile, her head tilted slightly to one side. Her right hand is raised in front of her chest making a victory sign, left hand naturally at her side. She wears a delicate silver necklace with a small star pendant and a simple pink beaded bracelet on her right wrist. The illustration is rendered in the best quality, with ultra-detailed, high-resolution 4K clarity. The background is a soft gradient from pink-purple to light blue that complements the character, ensuring she remains the focal point. The overall style is vibrant, clean, and typical of high-quality anime artwork.
